paper_title: Wafer-level uniformity of atomic-layer-deposited niobium nitride thin films for quantum devices

experiment_blocks.objective: To explore the large-area uniformity of thin ALD-NbN films by investigating the morphological, structural, and superconducting properties spread up to a wafer size of 6 in.
l6_interpretations: The uniformity of superconducting thin films over large areas becomes critical in terms of both general feasibility and fabrication yield.

comparison_blocks.logic: The uniformity of superconducting thin films over large areas becomes critical in terms of both general feasibility and fabrication yield.
